slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard SemiBold, no decoration, no quotes. Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 003. Center: large warm brown bold headline 아기가 기침할 때, two lines, 등 두드리기 금지 with teal green #2C7A5C underline. Below: small gray subtitle 질식 vs 기침 구별법과 응급처치 · AAP 권장 기준. Bottom center: LARGE cute character illustration of worried parent holding coughing baby gently, warm cozy colors, chubby characters, soft pastel tones. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 기침의 역할. Large bold headline: 기침은 warm brown, 정상 반응이에요 teal green #2C7A5C with underline. Center: cute illustration of baby coughing with small particles coming out, showing natural defense mechanism, warm colors. Below: two cream #FFF0E0 rounded cards stacked. First card: 기도 이물질 제거 bold + small icon of airway. Second card: 강한 기침은 스스로 배출 신호 bold + small checkmark. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 위험. Large bold headline: 기침할 때 warm brown, 등 두드리면 안 돼요 coral #E05C3A with underline. Center: illustration of hand about to pat baby's back with large red X overlay, worried expression. Below: cream #FFF0E0 rounded card with warning icon. 음식물이 기도로 떨어져 완전 막힘 위험 bold warm brown. Small text: 기침 중에는 아무것도 하지 마세요. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 구별법. Large bold headline: 질식과 warm brown, 기침은 달라요 teal green #2C7A5C with underline. Center: two side-by-side comparison cards cream #FFF0E0 rounded. Left card: 질식 bold coral + illustration of silent blue-faced baby + 소리 없음 · 숨 못 쉼 · 얼굴 파랗게. Right card: 기침 bold teal + illustration of coughing baby with sound waves + 소리 남 · 숨 쉼 · 스스로 배출. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 실제 질식 시. Large bold headline: 진짜 질식일 때만 warm brown, 응급처치 하세요 coral #E05C3A with underline. Center: illustration showing alternating sequence with arrows, cute style. Top: 5회 등 두드리기 + baby face-down icon. Arrow down. Bottom: 5회 가슴 압박 + baby face-up icon. Small cream card below: 영아에게 복부 압박 절대 금지 with X icon. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 등 두드리기. Large bold headline: 올바른 warm brown, 자세가 중요해요 teal green #2C7A5C with underline. Center: LARGE illustration showing proper infant position on adult's forearm, baby face-down, head lower than body, hand supporting jaw and neck, warm detailed style. Below: two cream #FFF0E0 rounded instruction cards. First: 머리가 몸통보다 낮게 bold + angle icon. Second: 어깨뼈 사이 5회 빠르고 강하게 bold + hand icon. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 가슴 압박. Large bold headline: 등 두드리기 후에도 warm brown, 안 나오면 가슴 압박 teal green #2C7A5C with underline. Center: LARGE illustration showing infant flipped face-up on adult's arm, head still low, hand positioned on chest center below nipples, warm detailed style. Below: two cream #FFF0E0 rounded instruction cards. First: 아기 뒤집어 얼굴 위로 bold + flip icon. Second: 젖꼭지 아래 가슴뼈 중앙 5회 압박 bold + chest icon. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 주의사항. Large bold headline: 이럴 땐 warm brown, CPR을 하세요 coral #E05C3A with underline. Center: illustration of baby with medical symbols around (asthma inhaler, infection icon, swelling icon, head injury icon), warm but serious tone. Below: cream #FFF0E0 rounded card. 천식·감염·부종·머리 외상 시 CPR bold + 등 두드리기·가슴 압박 금지. Small bottom card teal: 질식 해결 후에도 반드시 의료진 진찰. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Large headline: 오늘 확인하고 저장하세요 warm brown, 저장하세요 teal #2C7A5C underline. Source box cream #FFF0E0 rounded. 출처 warm brown small bold, MedlinePlus Medical Encyclopedia Updated 2026-02, AHA AAP Guidelines for CPR and ECC 2025, AAP HealthyChildren.org 2015, ASHA Leader 2016. Warm brown divider line. 소아과언니 warm brown bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray. Divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 warm brown. 소아과수첩 앱 · 진료 메모로 응급 상황 기록 teal. No pixel text. No quotes. Cute character illustrations around brand block of doctor with baby and heart icons.

common_style:
# 캐릭터 일러스트 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 소프트 파스텔 베이지 #FFF8F0
- 텍스트: 웜 브라운 #3D2B1F
- 강조: teal green #2C7A5C
- 경고: coral #E05C3A
- 카드 배경: 크림 #FFF0E0
- 일러스트: 따뜻한 수채화풍 아기/엄마/음식 캐릭터 (cute, chubby, warm)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 warm brown (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0.
Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard SemiBold, no decoration, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · [번호].
Center: large warm brown bold headline [토픽 핵심어], two lines, [둘째 줄] with teal green #2C7A5C underline.
Below: small gray subtitle [부제] · AAP 권장 기준.
Bottom center: LARGE cute character illustration [토픽 관련 귀여운 아기/엄마 장면], warm cozy colors, chubby characters.
No pixel text. No quotes.

## 2x2 그리드 패턴
Four cards in 2x2 grid, each light cream #FFF0E0 rounded.
Each card: cute character illustration inside + Korean label below.
Small teal checkmark corner.
Warm pastel colors throughout.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (귀여운 X)
Four forbidden food/item cards in 2x2 grid.
Each: cute illustrated item with red X overlay + Korean label + reason.
Warm background maintained (NOT dark).

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0.
Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE.
Large headline: 오늘 확인하고 저장하세요 warm brown, 저장하세요 teal #2C7A5C underline.
Source box cream #FFF0E0 rounded.

· [출처 2]

Divider.
